plugins.name: dag
plugins.description: Gated, multi-phase task execution with FORMALLY-ENFORCED invariants (JSON Schemas + finite-state-machine spec + a runnable validator, plus a formal-model layer — TLA+ machine-checked with TLC, Alloy hand-proved): a universal Socratic move-set referenced by every prompt, applied selectively, clarification, contextual cartography, atomic work-unit DAG, budget-capped subagent executors with propose/critique personas, independent adversarial verification, formalized bounded self-learning loops, adaptive anti-hallucination evidence standards, and a durable plan/decision/progress/learnings ledger.
